# Editable Packages

Tests for editable package installations in resolution.

## Basic editables

### Compile editable packages

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_editable -->

Compile requirements including editable packages with extras.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
-e ../../test/packages/poetry_editable
-e file://../../test/packages/black_editable[dev]
boltons # normal dependency for comparison
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in
-e ../../test/packages/poetry_editable
    # via -r [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in
-e file://../../test/packages/black_editable
    # via -r [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in
aiohttp==3.9.3
    # via black
aiosignal==1.3.1
    # via aiohttp
anyio==4.3.0
    # via poetry-editable
attrs==23.2.0
    # via aiohttp
boltons==23.1.1
    # via -r [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in
frozenlist==1.4.1
    # via
    #   aiohttp
    #   aiosignal
idna==3.6
    # via
    #   anyio
    #   yarl
multidict==6.0.5
    # via
    #   aiohttp
    #   yarl
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio
uvloop==0.19.0
    # via black
yarl==1.9.4
    # via aiohttp

----- stderr -----
Resolved 13 packages in [TIME]
```

### Deduplicate editables

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::deduplicate_editable -->

Repeated editable packages are deduplicated.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
-e file://../../test/packages/black_editable
-e ${PROJECT_ROOT}/../../test/packages/black_editable
-e file://../../test/packages/black_editable[dev]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in
-e file://../../test/packages/black_editable
    # via -r [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in
aiohttp==3.9.3
    # via black
aiosignal==1.3.1
    # via aiohttp
attrs==23.2.0
    # via aiohttp
frozenlist==1.4.1
    # via
    #   aiohttp
    #   aiosignal
idna==3.6
    # via yarl
multidict==6.0.5
    # via
    #   aiohttp
    #   yarl
uvloop==0.19.0
    # via black
yarl==1.9.4
    # via aiohttp

----- stderr -----
Resolved 9 packages in [TIME]
```

### Editable with lowest-direct

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::editable_direct_dependency -->

Editable packages work with lowest-direct resolution strategy.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
-e ../../test/packages/setuptools_editable
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --resolution lowest-direct
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in --resolution lowest-direct
-e ../../test/packages/setuptools_editable
    # via -r [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in
iniconfig==0.1
    # via setuptools-editable

----- stderr -----
Resolved 2 packages in [TIME]
```

## Error handling

### Missing editable file

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::missing_editable_file -->

Editable requirements must point to directories, not archives.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
-e foo/anyio-3.7.0.tar.gz
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: Unsupported editable requirement in `requirements.in`
  Caused by: Editable must refer to a local directory, not an archive: `file://[TEMP_DIR]/foo/anyio-3.7.0.tar.gz`
```

### Missing editable directory

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::missing_editable_directory -->

Editable requirements must point to existing directories.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
-e foo/bar
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: Distribution not found at: file://[TEMP_DIR]/foo/bar
```

## URL requirements

### Unnamed URL with package name

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::unnamed_requirement_with_package_name -->

Package names can be extracted from wheel URLs.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/36/42/015c23096649b908c809c69388a805a571a3bea44362fe87e33fc3afa01f/flask-3.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/36/42/015c23096649b908c809c69388a805a571a3bea44362fe87e33fc3afa01f/flask-3.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
werkzeug==3.0.1
    # via flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

### Strip fragment from URL

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::strip_fragment_unnamed -->

Fragment identifiers are preserved in output but ignored for resolution.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
../../test/packages/black_editable#egg=black
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in
../../test/packages/black_editable#egg=black
    # via -r [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Named URL with fragment

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::strip_fragment_named -->

Fragment identifiers work with named requirements.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black @ ../../test/packages/black_editable#egg=black
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in
../../test/packages/black_editable#egg=black
    # via -r [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```
